data.name: 戰鬥修女蕾雅
data.detailed_description:
在阿德利亞修道院，聚集了一群被稱為「戰鬥修女」的除靈專家。

某一天，她們接到了一個委託。

委託內容是要求她們清除洞窟中湧現的惡靈，因為那裡已經成為採礦場，

而惡靈的出現對王國的經濟命脈構成了威脅。

許多礦工已經聚集在那裡，迫切需要拯救。

而被指名的就是最強的戰鬥修女蕾雅。

蕾雅是一名純粹的除靈師，從小就開始與惡靈戰鬥。

她首先來到洞窟入口附近的邊境哨所。

這裡有礦工的臨時住所，以及方便工人們籌措工具而設立的各種設施。

此處有男女澡堂只用一片簾子隔開的天然溫泉；清理工作總是做不完的廁所；

此外，還有為了滿足男性而建立的「風俗店」等等……

畢生都致力於除靈的虔誠修女蕾雅，等待她的是充滿淫慾的故事情節！

這是一個簡單的色色RPG，你需要在住處和地下城之間探索，一邊推進劇情。

在地下城中，沒有戰鬥，只需用魔法射擊擊中敵人即可擊敗它們。

然而，在洞穴中，由於邪靈的影響，空氣中充滿了「費洛蒙氣體」，

隨著深入，「淫亂值」將更容易升高。

當「淫亂值」增加時，魔力的消耗將急劇增加。

（為了讓戰敗變得容易，各處都設置了超級淫亂毒氣沼澤）

遇到敵人 一招打天下

情慾值系統 隨著H事件會有明顯變化！

獲得的服裝可以在裝備畫面中進行更改，並影響立繪。

情慾值系統 隨著H事件會有明顯變化！

獲得的服裝可以在裝備畫面中進行更改，並影響立繪。
data.short_description: 被惡靈佔領的洞窟，教會派出了最強的戰鬥修女蕾雅！ 在地下城中有很多淫慾的事件等著蕾雅。 她是否能在不違背神的戒律之下拯救礦工呢……？
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Battle Sister Leah
data.detailed_description:
Monastery of Adelia Abbey, a group of exorcism experts known as the "Battle Sister" gather.

One day, they receive a commission.

The commission requests them to clear the emerging evil spirits in a cave, which has now become a mining site.

The appearance of these evil spirits poses a threat to the kingdom's economic lifeline.

Many miners have gathered there, urgently needing rescue.

The one appointed for this task is the strongest battle sister, Leah.

Leah is an exorcist who has been fighting evil spirits since childhood.

She first arrives at the checkpoint near the cave entrance.

There, temporary accommodation for miners and various facilities for preparing tools are set up.

There is a natural hot spring, with male and female bath areas separated by only a curtain.

In addition, there is a "Brothel" created to satisfy male needs, and more...

Sister Leah, a devout sister dedicated to exorcism, whose life takes a sinful turn with lustful!

This is a simple adult RPG based on exploring bases and dungeons.

In the dungeon, there is no combat; you only need to chant magic to defeat enemies.

However, in the cave, due to the influence of evil spirits, the air is filled with "pheromone gas," and as you progress, the "erotic" becomes easier to increase.

As the "erotic" increases, the consumption of magic points will sharply increase.

(To make you defeat, super lusty poisonous swamps are placed throughout.)

Use the skill to exorcise evil spirits with one blow.

Erotic status - undergoes obvious changes with each H event!

Change outfits obtained in the equipment screen, influencing character illustrations.

data.short_description: The strongest battle sister, Leah, sent by the church to the haunted cave occupied by evil spirits! Within the dungeon, numerous lewd events await Leah. Will she be able to save the miners without violating the divine commandments?
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
